sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45893" key="e)xeni/keion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐχε-νίκειον</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">νῑ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n45893.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">endowment created by Echenice, Inscr. Délos</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">370.42</biblScope> </bibl>:—hence <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐχέ-εια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">festival maintained thereby</tr_>, ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">366</biblScope> </bibl> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">A</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">133</biblScope> </bibl> <date TEIform="date">(iii B. C.)</date>.</sense> </entryFree>
